arts.ttl: Bellingham, Foden or Palmer? Lee Carsley knows England need something else entirely
arts.sum: Carsley has been comapred to Pep Guardiola and will need to find a way to maximise the attacking talent available to the Three Lions

arts.ttl: How to watch England vs Greece – TV channel and kick-off time
arts.sum: England resume their Nations League campaign when Greece visit Wembley on Thursday evening. Lee Carsley’s side have taken maximum points from their two Group B 2 games to date, though face a Greece team who sit above them on goal difference after also beating Finland and the Republic of Ireland in September. England are aiming […] The post How to watch England vs Greece – TV channel and kick-off time first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: George Baldock found dead in pool after wife back in England raised the alarm
arts.sum: Former Premier League defender George Baldock has tragically passed away at the age of 31 in Greece, just months after moving abroad to join Panathinaikos in the summer

arts.ttl: John Stones makes bold Pep Guardiola claim about interim England manager Lee Carsley
arts.sum: Manchester City defender John Stones believes Lee Carsley is similar to Pep Guardiola "in many ways", with the interim England manager preparing for his side's upcoming clashes with Greece and Finland

arts.ttl: What channel is England vs Greece on? Kick-off time, TV and live stream details
arts.sum: England take on Greece at Wembley this evening in their latest Nations League clash, with Lee Carsley looking to guide the Three Lions to another vital three points

arts.ttl: How Cole Palmer became England's Player of the Year despite his limited time on pitch
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has scooped an award for his performances for England over the past year, despite being handed just two starts by former Three Lions boss Gareth Southgate

arts.ttl: Thursday's Nations League predictions including England vs. Greece
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Nations League fixtures, including England vs. Greece.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley expects more England youngsters to move abroad as he explains problem
arts.sum: Interim England manager Lee Carsley believes more young English players leave the Premier League in search of more first team opportunities, highlighting the examples of Jamie Bynoe-Gittens and Sam Illing-Junior

Things went well in Carsley's first two games as interim boss, securing 2-0 triumphs over Finland and the Republic of Ireland, but a handful of injuries mean it could be a different-looking XI to those that featured last month. England's bid to escape League B of the Nations League continues on Thursday night in their first game of the October international break against Greece.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool star set to get his sole England cap 20 YEARS after making his Three Lions debut after FA finally correct rare error
arts.sum: A former Liverpool star is finally set to receive his first commemorative Three Lions cap from the FA after the organisation corrected the mistake they made almost 20 years after his solo outing.
